Contracts & Templates
IMPORTANT! The below are templates we use in our business, we are governed by NZ law and every country will
have different rules and regulations. This is NOT legal material - please consult a lawyer to develop your own TOS.
This is important guys!!!
Confidentiality Agreement:
Certain leads will want you to provide them with a signed NDA before allowing you access into their ad accounts. Here's a template (we use 17 Hats to send out signed contracts)
Download Now!
Proposal Template
We use Proposify to build and put together our proposals, you can find an example of one here:
https://eightloopsocial.proposify.biz/preview/67Vdbbbbbc
Contract/ Service Agreement
Terms of Service contract for clients - please edit accordingly. We use HelloSign to send out contracts
IMPORTANT: This is NOT Legal Advice! Please use as a template but you MUST get a lawyer across all your contracts and terms of service
Clauses for the contract:
Fees - what are the fees for services and service term length
Payment Terms - when are invoices/deductions made and how long does a client have to pay. Stipulation about what happens in instance of late payment or failure to pay (ie: debt collection
agency, client responsible for those fees)
Cancellation Terms - What happens if client bails before contract term is up
Scope/Deliverables - what’s included in the terms of service. What are fees and process if work goes over scope.
Guarantees - no guarantees of results are promised and client agrees to this
Attribution/Tracking - what platform is tracking for reporting purposes being done from
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

Reporting - frequency of reporting, fee for additional reporting if client requires
Client Responsibilities - some things to consider and clarify: community management of ads, payments to Facebook and bounced/disapproved payments, data compliance
Case Study - stipulation that you will use success story as part of agency marketing
Data Compliance - following the GDPR and updated FB terms, this clause protects you as an agency if you plan on using the pixel or custom audiences
Contract transferability - that you as an agency can transfer the account to another party without requiring permission from the client (good if yo plan on selling up at some stage)
----------------
OTHER IMPORTANT CONSIDERATION
Jurisdiction and Dispute Resolution
DOWNLOAD HERE
Privacy Policy
Standard Privacy Policy to use on client landing pages when they don't have one.
ACCESS NOW
Cancellation of Terms - how much notice, what fees will be applied/due
Non refundable - add a clause that stipulates that, as long as the service is delivered as scoped then no refund provided
No guarantees - add stipulation that there are certain benchmarks to hit but the agency does not promise or guarantee results
Project scope - that the amount is for what is covered in the scope, that any work beyond this will be charges out additionally
Client Responsibilities - add stipulation that agency is not responsible for getting on calls with leads or anything that happens after leads are generated.
Payment failure - what happens if payment is late? Will you remove the campaigns, will you charge penalty fee, will they need to cover debt collection fees?
Case Studies - add clause that you will be using results as marketing material (for case studies) without revealing sensitive information unless otherwise specified
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
